per_eval.note: Now saturated; previously this eval had stronger separation.
Refined unfamiliar-repo eval is saturated under current grader/run behavior.
Validation Plan named-steps check remains a live discriminator.
Saturated; no longer reproduces prior old-skill capitulation signal.

details: Overall benchmark still favors with_skill, but only by 1.8 percentage points.
Most evals are now saturated and no longer useful for ranking skill quality.
Current benchmark signal is effectively carried by eval-2 only.

recommended_next_actions: Harden grader prompts with explicit fail conditions for policy bypass language to reduce lenient passes.
Add at least two new adversarial evals that force trade-off refusal behavior (e.g., skip code-simplifier, merge review passes, or postpone TDD under deadline).
For eval-1, require a structured output contract (go/no-go + checklist + bounded questions + risk-to-phase mapping) and grade exact section presence plus content constraints.
Re-run in iteration-14 with strict grading controls and compare against iteration-11/12 baselines.
